title: Binance’s Yi He warns of alleged impersonation scam, CoinUp denies ties

briefing: Bitcoin analysis warned of "new lows" as Asia markets dropped as much as 10% and BTC price action dipped below $62,000 for the first time in nearly two weeks.

title: THORChain resumes trading more than month after $10M exploit
summary: THORChain resumes trading more than month after $10M exploit
briefing: THORChain resumed all network activity after implementing multiple security upgrades and a vault migration to fix the vulnerabilities that led to the $10.7 million exploit.

title: US Senate passes housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030

briefing: The Senate voted 85-5 to pass a major housing affordability bill that includes a ban on the Federal Reserve making a central bank digital currency until 2030.
